name: Classic Omelette
instructions: Whisk eggs with milk, salt, and pepper. Melt butter in a pan over medium heat. Pour in egg mixture and cook, folding gently, until just set. Fold in half and serve.

name: Scrambled Eggs on Toast
instructions: Melt butter in a pan. Whisk eggs with salt and pepper, pour into pan, and stir gently over low heat until creamy. Serve over toasted bread.

name: Tomato and Onion Omelette
instructions: Sauté chopped onion and tomato in oil until soft. Whisk eggs with salt and pepper, pour over vegetables, and cook until set.

name: Avocado Toast
instructions: Toast bread. Mash avocado with lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Spread over toast.

name: Pancakes
instructions: Mix flour, sugar, and baking powder. Whisk in egg and milk until smooth. Cook spoonfuls of batter in a buttered pan until golden on both sides.

name: French Toast
instructions: Whisk egg, milk, sugar, and cinnamon. Dip bread slices and fry in buttered pan until golden on both sides.

name: Yogurt and Honey Bowl
instructions: Slice banana into a bowl of yogurt, drizzle with honey, and serve.

name: Garlic Butter Pasta
instructions: Boil pasta until al dente. Melt butter with minced garlic in a pan. Toss pasta with garlic butter, season, and top with parmesan.

name: Tomato Pasta
instructions: Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil. Add chopped tomatoes and simmer into a sauce. Toss with cooked pasta and fresh basil.

name: Chicken Stir Fry
instructions: Slice chicken and stir-fry in hot oil until cooked. Add garlic, onion, and bell pepper. Stir in soy sauce and cook 2 more minutes.

name: Beef and Potato Stew
instructions: Brown beef chunks. Add chopped onion, carrot, and potato. Cover with water, season, and simmer until tender, about 1 hour.

name: Grilled Chicken with Rice
instructions: Marinate chicken with lemon, salt, and pepper. Grill or pan-fry until cooked through. Serve over cooked rice.

name: Vegetable Fried Rice
instructions: Scramble egg in oil, set aside. Stir-fry onion and carrot, add cooked rice and soy sauce, mix in egg, and stir well.

name: Lentil Soup
instructions: Sauté onion, carrot, and garlic in olive oil. Add lentils and water, simmer until lentils are soft, about 30 minutes. Season with salt.

name: Tomato Rice Soup
instructions: Sauté onion and garlic. Add chopped tomato and water, simmer, then add rice and cook until tender.

name: Cheese Quesadilla
instructions: Place cheese between two tortillas. Cook in a buttered pan until golden and cheese is melted on both sides.

name: Chicken Quesadilla
instructions: Cook chicken with onion in oil. Layer with cheese inside a tortilla, fold, and cook until crispy and melted.

name: Grilled Cheese Sandwich
instructions: Butter bread slices, add cheese between them, and grill in a pan until golden and cheese is melted.

name: Tuna Sandwich
instructions: Mix tuna with mayonnaise, chopped onion, salt, and pepper. Spread between bread slices.

name: Potato Salad
instructions: Boil potatoes and eggs until tender. Chop and mix with mayonnaise, chopped onion, salt, and pepper.

name: Cucumber Tomato Salad
instructions: Chop cucumber, tomato, and onion. Toss with olive oil, lemon juice, and salt.

name: Hummus and Veggie Wrap
instructions: Spread hummus on tortilla, layer with sliced cucumber, tomato, and lettuce, then roll up.

name: Egg Fried Rice
instructions: Scramble egg in oil. Add chopped onion and cooked rice, stir-fry with soy sauce until heated through.

name: Banana Smoothie
instructions: Blend banana, milk, yogurt, and honey until smooth.

name: Apple Cinnamon Oatmeal
instructions: Cook oats with milk over medium heat. Stir in diced apple and cinnamon, sweeten with honey.

name: Peanut Butter Banana Toast
instructions: Toast bread, spread peanut butter, and top with banana slices.

name: Garlic Roasted Potatoes
instructions: Toss potato chunks with olive oil, minced garlic, salt, pepper, and rosemary. Roast at 200°C until golden and crispy, about 30 minutes.

name: Spicy Chickpea Curry
instructions: Sauté onion and garlic in oil. Add tomato and curry powder, cook into a sauce, then stir in chickpeas and simmer 10 minutes.

name: Mushroom Risotto
instructions: Sauté onion, garlic, and mushroom in butter. Add rice and gradually stir in warm water until creamy. Finish with parmesan.

name: Shrimp Garlic Pasta
instructions: Cook pasta. Sauté shrimp and garlic in butter until shrimp is pink. Toss with pasta, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.

name: Caprese Salad
instructions: Slice tomato and cheese, layer with fresh basil leaves, drizzle with olive oil and salt.

name: Chicken Caesar Salad
instructions: Grill chicken and slice. Toss lettuce with mayonnaise-lemon dressing, top with chicken, parmesan, and croutons made from toasted bread.

name: Vegetable Soup
instructions: Sauté onion and celery. Add carrot, potato, and water. Simmer until vegetables are tender, season with salt and pepper.

name: Baked Salmon with Lemon
instructions: Place salmon on a tray, drizzle with olive oil and lemon, season with salt, pepper, and minced garlic. Bake at 200°C for 15 minutes.

name: Stuffed Bell Peppers
instructions: Mix cooked rice with cooked beef, chopped onion, and tomato. Stuff into halved bell peppers and bake at 190°C for 25 minutes.

name: Onion and Egg Stir Fry
instructions: Sauté sliced onion in oil until soft. Pour in beaten eggs and stir-fry until cooked. Season with salt and pepper.

name: Carrot and Ginger Soup
instructions: Sauté onion and ginger in olive oil. Add chopped carrot and water, simmer until soft, then blend smooth.

name: Classic Hummus
instructions: Blend chickpeas, garlic, lemon juice, olive oil, and salt until smooth and creamy.

name: Greek Yogurt Cucumber Dip
instructions: Grate cucumber and squeeze out excess water. Mix with yogurt, minced garlic, salt, and a drizzle of olive oil.

name: Banana Pancakes
instructions: Mash banana, whisk in egg, flour, milk, and cinnamon. Cook spoonfuls in a pan until golden on both sides.

name: Rice and Beans
instructions: Sauté onion and garlic in oil. Add cooked beans and rice, season with salt, and heat through, mixing well.

name: Spinach and Cheese Omelette
instructions: Sauté spinach in butter until wilted. Pour beaten eggs over, sprinkle cheese, and cook until set. Fold and serve.

name: Chicken Noodle Soup
instructions: Simmer chicken in water with onion and carrot until cooked. Shred chicken, return to pot, add pasta, and cook until tender.

name: Roasted Vegetable Medley
instructions: Chop all vegetables, toss with olive oil, salt, and pepper. Roast at 200°C for 30-35 minutes until tender and golden.

name: Egg and Avocado Toast
instructions: Toast bread and spread mashed avocado on top. Fry or poach an egg and place on top, season with salt and pepper.

name: Simple Garlic Bread
instructions: Mix softened butter with minced garlic and salt. Spread on bread slices and toast until golden.

name: Tomato Cheese Toast
instructions: Top bread slices with sliced tomato and cheese, drizzle with olive oil and salt, then bake or toast until cheese melts.

name: Chicken Fried Rice
instructions: Stir-fry chicken until cooked. Push aside, scramble egg, then add onion and cooked rice. Mix everything with soy sauce.

name: Carrot and Potato Mash
instructions: Boil carrot and potato until soft, then mash with butter, milk, salt, and pepper.

name: Simple Bean Salad
instructions: Mix beans, chopped tomato, and onion. Dress with olive oil, lemon juice, and salt.

name: Honey Yogurt Parfait
instructions: Layer yogurt, oats, and sliced banana in a glass. Drizzle honey between layers.
